problem id: e5ae7b47
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  01100100 -> 00000001
  01101010 -> 00000001
  10001011 -> 00001100
  00101000 -> 00000000
  01110011 -> 10001001
  11110010 -> 10000011
  11011110 -> 01110010
  00110111 -> 10011000

query: 10000100
predicted answer: 00000000
